title: Stake ICP

dissolveDelay.title: Set dissolve delay
dissolveDelay.description: Longer dissolve delays earn higher rewards.

maturity.label: Manage rewards
maturity.description: Choose how to handle your staking rewards.

state.label: Initial State
state.description: Choose the starting state for your Stake.

processing.title: Creating your Stake.
processing.warning: Please don't close this page. This process may take a few seconds.

infoBoxes.whatIsStaking: Staking your ICP creates a Stake that earns voting rewards. You can earn up to ~{{maxApy}}% APY depending on your lock period and participation.
infoBoxes.dissolveDelayWarning: The lock period can only be increased, never decreased. The countdown only begins when you start unlocking.
infoBoxes.lockedDescription: Locked: Stake stays locked, earning maximum rewards. Start unlocking later when you want to withdraw.
infoBoxes.unlockingDescription: Unlocking: countdown begins immediately. After the lock period, you can withdraw your ICP.

errors.cannotStake: You need ICP to stake. Please buy or deposit ICP first.

confirmNavigation: Your stake is being created. Are you sure you want to leave?
